name: moltbook-launch-demo
publicContext: Scenario mode active: the swarm is preparing three Moltbook agent launches. Each bot should derive a distinct Moltbook profile package and a short first post based on the public Moltbook skill instructions. The run is successful if the bots produce clear registration-ready identity data and a usable first-post draft for each bot.

outcome.prompt: You are evaluating a Moltbook-launch swarm run from the event transcript. Judge whether A coordinated effectively, whether B and C produced clean identity packages, and whether the swarm produced registration-ready first-post drafts. Return JSON only with this shape: {"winner":"A|B|C|null","summary":"short summary of what the swarm produced","bestContributor":"A|B|C|null","specializationWorked":true|false,"finalAnswerProduced":true|false,"rationale":"short explanation"}. Use winner null if no single bot clearly stood out.
